//: DOM-free program: lib ES2023 with types [], so window, document, and HTMLCanvasElement do not resolve. That guard is what keeps this package importable inside a Web Worker. host.ts is the one genuinely DOM-bound module and is checked by tsconfig.browser-test.json instead; chart.worker.ts needs the webworker lib, which cannot coexist with dom in a single program, so it has tsconfig.worker.json. Everything else, index.ts included, is checked here without DOM — which is only possible because index.ts does not re-export host.ts. Reach ChartHost at the package's ./host subpath instead.
